description: Just like how your blue jeans are an all time favourite, this grey lee t-shirt is made to last. It is a t-shirt which you will wear for years. Chosen from the lee Durabilt range, this t-shirt has a black urban print with just a hint of red to brighten it up. Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2.
